summary: Evidence Access Control & Polling Features (Iteration 97) - All tests passed. The evidence endpoint is now correctly opened to participants (same data for all, transparency). Frontend correctly conditions organizer-only fetches on viewer_role. Polling added for appointment detail (30s) and dashboard (60s).

backend_pytest: ✅ GET /api/checkin/evidence/{id} returns same data structure for participant as for organizer
frontend_playwright: ✅ Participant view: action banner visible with Accept/Decline buttons (status='invited')
✅ Participant view: trust signal banner visible ('1 participant a déjà confirmé son engagement')
✅ Participant view: proof tracking section visible ('Preuves de présence')
✅ Participant view: NO Google Calendar sync button
✅ Participant view: NO manage participants link
✅ Participant view: NO resend invitation buttons
✅ Participant view: NO edit pencil button
✅ Organizer view: Google Calendar sync button visible
✅ Organizer view: 'Gérer les participants' button visible
✅ Organizer view: Check-in avec GPS button visible
✅ Organizer view: Proof tracking section visible
✅ Organizer view: Edit pencil icon visible

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Backend checkin_routes.py correctly checks participant access for evidence endpoint (line 309-324)
✅ Backend returns same evidence data structure for both organizer and participant (transparency)
✅ Frontend AppointmentDetail.js correctly conditions organizer check-in fetch on viewerIsOrganizer (line 209)
✅ Frontend AppointmentDetail.js polling useEffect correctly implemented (30s interval, line 237-265)
✅ Frontend OrganizerDashboard.js polling useEffect correctly implemented (60s interval, line 425-439)
✅ Frontend ProofSessionsPanel.js validation buttons now correctly hidden for participants (fixed)
✅ Frontend VideoEvidencePanel only rendered for organizer (line 650)
✅ Frontend AttendancePanel only rendered for organizer (line 666)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Evidence endpoint now open to participants with same data structure (transparency). Frontend correctly hides organizer-only elements based on viewer_role. Polling implemented: 30s for appointment detail (when active), 60s for dashboard. ProofSessionsPanel validation buttons now correctly hidden for participants (shows 'En attente de validation' instead). VideoEvidencePanel and AttendancePanel remain organizer-only.

evidence_endpoint_access.verification: Returns 200 with same data structure for both organizer and participant

viewer_role_conditional_fetches.description: loadData() conditions organizer-only fetches on viewer_role
viewer_role_conditional_fetches.verification: Organizer check-in status only fetched when viewerIsOrganizer=true

appointment_detail_polling.description: Polling every 30s when appointment is active
appointment_detail_polling.verification: useEffect with setInterval(poll, 30000) when appointment is upcoming/ongoing

proof_sessions_read_only.description: ProofSessionsPanel validation buttons hidden for participants
proof_sessions_read_only.verification: Buttons only rendered when onValidateSession is provided

mocked_apis.Stripe: Dev mode - payment methods are pm_dev_* format
